About the Program

How the myTE Validation Program is architected, end to end
myTE Validation Program

End-to-end framework for timesheet plotting accuracy, paid-hours integrity, and compliance reporting.

A data quality and compliance framework built to detect miss-plotting of work hours and misuse of paid time in the myTE timesheet system. It consolidates three source systems, applies structured scrub logic, flags violations, and surfaces results through this HTML compliance dashboard, a validation report, and a Power BI analytics layer.

AT
Architected by Archival Talanay
1

Data Sources

WFM System, myTE Portal, and the HR / ACN Roster feed raw schedules, time entries, and agent attributes.

2

Consolidation

All three sources merge into one flat fact table, Fact_MyTE, via the Scrub Balancing Tool — one row per agent per day.

3

Scrub & Validation

Four checks per row: date accuracy, plotting validity, plotting category, and timeliness.

4

Miss-plotting Detection

Catches date mismatch, wrong charge code, and offset plotting that conceals invalid entries.

5

Paid-hours Integrity

Checks paid-leave misuse, PPA misuse, and unsupported tardy / unpaid deductions.

6

Validation Flags

Each row carries computed flags — IS VALID, IS INVALID, IS PPA, accuracy, and category.

7

Compliance Reporting

This HTML dashboard plus a structured validation exception report for corrective action.

8

Power BI Layer

A star-schema model on top of Fact_MyTE for executive and management reporting.

◆Data Sources

Three systems feed raw data into the program
  • WFM SystemAgent schedules, attendance codes, WFM DATE, paid time hours
  • myTE PortalAgent-submitted time entries — MyTE DATE and hours per charge code
  • HR / ACN RosterEID, agent name, CIM, LOB, supervisor, OM, ACN status

✓Scrub & Validation Logic

Four checks run across every row
  • Date accuracy — compares MyTE DATE vs WFM DATE → MyTE DATE ACCURACY (ACCURATE / INACCURATE).
  • Plotting validity — charge code category vs attendance status → IS VALID / IS INVALID.
  • Plotting category — Direct, Offset, Non-billable, Leave, or Admin.
  • Timeliness — submission timestamp vs deadline → IS ON TIME / IS DELAY.

!Miss-plotting Detection

Three specific patterns caught
  • Date mismatch — MyTE DATE ≠ WFM DATE; hours plotted to the wrong day.
  • Wrong charge code — category misaligned with attendance status (e.g. billable code on a sick-leave day).
  • Offset plotting — offset charge code concealing an invalid entry; eligible for PPA recovery.

₱Paid-hours Integrity

Three categories of misuse checked
  • Paid leave misuse — PAID LEAVE HRS where status doesn't entitle leave, or exceeds WFM entitlement.
  • PPA misuse — IS PPA entries without a matching invalid / offset entry, reconciled against For PPA Hours.
  • Tardy & unpaid — TARDY HRS or UNPAID HRS on rows whose status doesn't support deductions.

▦Validation Flags (computed columns)

Every row in Fact_MyTE carries these flags, consumed by all downstream reporting
ColumnValuesMeaning
IS VALID1 / 0Entry passed all plotting checks
IS INVALID1 / 0Entry failed one or more plotting checks
IS ON TIME1 / 0Submitted within deadline
IS DELAY1 / 0Submitted late
IS PPA1 / 0Entry is a PPA recovery record
DATA STATUS"No myTE Data" / blankAgent has no entry for the day
MyTE DATE ACCURACYACCURATE / INACCURATEDate alignment result
PLOTTING CATEGORYDirect / Offset / Leave / Non-billable / AdminEntry classification

▤Compliance Reporting Outputs

What the program surfaces

HTML Compliance Dashboard — interactive, self-contained: agent-level drill-down by EID with Late and Invalid (Absent + Paid) breakdowns, supervisor and OM roll-ups, and downloadable records filtered by All, Late, or Invalid. Runs entirely in the browser.

Validation Report — a structured exception report listing every miss-plotting instance and paid-hours misuse flag, grouped by agent and supervisor, with a reconciliation of PPA recovered vs eligible hours.

◧Power BI Analytics Layer

Star-schema model on top of Fact_MyTE

Dimensions: Dim_Date (131 days), Dim_Agent (1,348 agents), Dim_Attendance (13 statuses), Dim_ChargeCategory (5 categories).

Plotted / Paid Leave / Tardy / Unpaid Hours Valid & Invalid Count · Invalid % On-Time & Delay % PPA Recovered & Returned % Accuracy % Headcount by ACN status

Pages: Executive Summary · Validity & Compliance · Timeliness & PPA.

The scrub logic, data consolidation framework, validation rules, HTML compliance dashboard, and Power BI analytics model were designed and built by Archival Talanay. · Last updated June 2026
